WITH customer_2012_2013 AS (
    SELECT 
        ym1.CustomerID,
        ym1.Consumption AS Consumption_2012,
        ym2.Consumption AS Consumption_2013
    FROM yearmonth ym1
    LEFT JOIN yearmonth ym2 
        ON ym1.CustomerID = ym2.CustomerID 
        AND SUBSTR(ym2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
    WHERE SUBSTR(ym1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
      AND ym1.CustomerID = (
          SELECT CustomerID 
          FROM transactions_1k 
          WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' 
            AND Amount = 634.8
      ...

        y1.Consumption AS consumption_2012,
        y2.Consumption AS consumption_2013

        AND substr(y2.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
    WHERE substr(y1.Date, 1, 7) = '2012-08'

target_customer AS (

    FROM transactions_1k

WITH target_customer AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' 
      AND Amount = 634.8
),
consumption_data AS (
    SELECT 
        y.CustomerID,
        MAX(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption END) AS consumption_2012,
        MAX(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN target_customer tc ON y.CustomerID = tc.CustomerID
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
)
